meta.title: Pt 3 Eve Spaceplane "Pants Destroyer" development
meta.description:
Phase 3 development of our multistage Eve spaceplane the "Pants Destroyer". We decided the easiest way to get to Eve and back would be by using an ISRU (In Situ Resource Utilization) to refuel on Eve. This primarily helped the entry portion of Eve since there was less mass to slow down, the spaceplane would easily survive reentry. Once all systems were proven, we check that the heath shield could survive the Kerbin re-entry. This broadcast has been cut into two parts, so sorry for the un-natural sign off.

Show your support by visiting http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Streamed live on http://Twitch.tv/everydayastronaut on 1/3/2017

Instagram @EverydayAstronaut - http://instagram.com/everydayastronaut
